HEADER.TITLE: Alheba .. Your guide to the trends in Saudi Arabia
HEADER.SUBTITLE: Discover the best places and premium locations in Saudi Arabia

SERVICES.DESC1: Jahez is a Saudi platform specialized in delivering online restaurant orders. Because our quality standards are high, we at Jahez are keen to provide a unique customer experience.
SERVICES.DESC2: We ensure your food arrives hot and fresh, thanks to our efficient delivery network.
SERVICES.DESC3: Choose from a wide variety of restaurants and cuisines to satisfy every craving.

feature1.title: Discover everything that's trending
feature1.desc: The app brings you the latest trends in your area, from coffee shops, restaurants, and products to social media content. You won’t miss a thing!

feature2.title: Real reviews and experiences
feature2.desc: Check user reviews and actual experiences before visiting a place or buying a product.

feature3.title: Recommendations by your region
feature3.desc: It automatically shows you trends and hotspots based on your city or region, without you having to search.

feature4.title: Share and be influential
feature4.desc: You can add your evaluation and recommendations to others, and be part of the trend industry in your region.

feature5.title: Trusted application
feature5.desc: All content and sites are carefully reviewed and selected to ensure quality.

feature6.title: Share and be influential
feature6.desc: You can add your rating and recommendations to others, and be part of the trend industry in your region.

who-is-ready-desc: We're a Saudi team passionate about trends and local projects. We designed the Hiba app to be a digital platform showcasing everything trending in the Kingdom. Our goal is to support merchants and highlight the gifts that make a difference.

JOIN_US.TITLE: Join Us
JOIN_US.DESC: We are happy to welcome service providers (partners, productive families). Join us now (in Saudi Arabia only)

TYPES_OF_HEBBA.TITLE: Types of Gifts in the App

PLACE.DESCRIPTION: Discover the best places and premium locations

PRODUCTS.DESCRIPTION: Wide range of premium products and services

VIDEOS.TITLE: Trending Videos
VIDEOS.DESCRIPTION: Watch the latest trending videos and premium content

FAQ.TITLE: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.SUBTITLE: Feel free to contact us
FAQ.FORM_PROMPT: Have another question? Don’t hesitate to ask us now!
FAQ.NAME: Your Name

QUESTIONS.A: Follow these steps: 1- Update your device to the latest version 2- Create an order and you can activate Apple Pay service by choosing the payment method (Apple Pay or Cash) and sending the order to the restaurant 3- After the order is accepted, you can choose the payment method from the order tracking page and click on Apple Pay 4- The amount will be deducted and the process will be successful.

why-is-ready-desc: Al-Hiba reflects our vision of showcasing the latest and trending restaurants, cafes, products, and trending videos, based on the user's location and interests, to provide them with a fresh, trending experience at all times.
